concept_name: During the past 6 months How often do you have trouble wrapping up the final details of a project, once the challenging parts have been done?
During the past 6 months How often do you have difficulty getting things in order when you have to do a task that requires organization?
During the past 6 months How often do you have problems remembering appointments or obligations?
During the past 6 months When you have a task that requires a lot of thought, how often do you avoid or delay getting started?
During the past 6 months How often do you fidget or squirm with your hands or feet when you have to sit down for a long time?
During the past 6 months How often do you feel overly active and compelled to do things, like you were driven by a motor?
Have you ever had a period of time when you were feeling so good, high, excited, or hyper that other people thought you were not your normal self or you were so hyper that you got into trouble?
Please try to remember a period when you were in a high or irritable state and select all of the following that apply:

How much of a problem have these high or irritable periods caused you?

Did you ever see something that wasn't really there that other people could not see? Please do not include any times when you were dreaming or half-asleep or under the influence of alcohol or drugs.

How distressing did you find having any of these experiences (such as seeing a vision, hearing a voice, believing that something strange was trying to communicate with you, or there was a plot against you)?

With this definition in mind, did you ever in your life have a panic attack?
Have any of these panic attacks occurred out of the blue for no apparent reason?
After these attacks started, did you worry a lot about having another attack or do anything differently to avoid having another attack?
About how many panic attacks have you ever had in your life?

Have you ever been bothered with thoughts, images, or urges that kept coming back over and over, even when you didn't want them to, like concerns with germs, order, or experiencing horrific images or intrusive sexual thoughts, or urges to knock or touch objects, or harming a loved one?

Was there ever anything that you had to do over and over again and was hard to resist doing, like hand washing, checking the stove, or repeating something over and over a certain number of times or until it feels just right?
Have you ever been unable to stop picking at your skin?
Have you ever been unable to stop pulling out your hair, eyebrows or eyelashes?
Were you ever in your life so painfully shy or scared of social situations (like attending a party, speaking to strangers, eating in public) that you avoided social situations whenever you could?
Did this ever last for more than 6 months?
Do you worry more than most people about being embarrassed, looking stupid, or being judged by other people?
Did this ever last for more than 6 months?

Some people have a lot of fear or anxiety about things like going out of the house alone, being in a crowd, standing in lines, going over bridges, or traveling by bus, train or car. Were you ever in your life so frightened by any of these situations that it got in the way of you having a normal life?
Did these feelings of fear or anxiety in situations like these ever last for more than 6 months?
